                <executions>

                    <execution>
                        <id>report</id>
                        <phase>test</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>report</goal>
                        </goals>

            </plugin>
            <plugin>

                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>attach-sources</id>

                            <goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>attach-javadocs</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>release</id>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.sonatype.central</groupId>
                        <artifactId>central-publishing-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <extensions>true</extensions>
                        <configuration>
                            <publishingServerId>central</publishingServerId>
                            <autoPublish>true</autoPublish>
                            <waitUntil>published</waitUntil>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>sign-artifacts</id>
                                <phase>verify</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>sign</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

</project>

content.text: I found the markdown-with-html path: `MarkdownGeneratorFactory` selects `MarkdownHTMLGenerator`, which only overrides table rendering; normal paragraphs/headings still use `MarkdownGenerator.writeSemanticTextNode`. The missing spaces are therefore likely introduced earlier in `TextLineProcessor`, where adjacent `TextChunk`s are merged and spaces are inserted only when the geometric gap exceeds a threshold.

input.command: ls "$HOME/.m2/repository/org/verapdf" && for j in "$HOME"/.m2/repository/org/verapdf/*/*/*.jar; do case "$j" in *sources*) ;; *) if jar tf "$j" | grep -q 'org/verapdf/wcag/algorithms/semanticalgorithms/utils/TextChunkUtils.class'; then printf '%s\n' "$j"; fi;; esac; done

content.text:
Implemented the bug fix.

Summary:
- Located the issue in `TextLineProcessor`: whitespace-only `TextChunk`s were being discarded before line construction.
- Reproduced the concatenation with a temporary regression test using chunks like `Evolution`, whitespace, `Of`, whitespace, `Search`, which previously produced `EvolutionOfSearch`.
- Fixed the processor so whitespace chunks are preserved when they belong to the current line, while still ignoring empty chunks and leading whitespace.
- Validated the fix with:
  - Temporary regression test: passed after the fix.
  - Existing `TextLineProcessorTest` class: passed.
- Removed the temporary regression test as requested.

Final modified file:
- `java/opendataloader-pdf-core/src/main/java/org/opendataloader/pdf/processors/TextLineProcessor.java`

No commits were created.
